VaultEntry.title: Vault Entry
VaultEntry.description: An encrypted password entry in the user's vault.

uid.description: The user ID of the owner.

encryptedData.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted JSON containing title, username, password, website, and notes.

iv.description: Base64 encoded Initialization Vector used for encryption.

updatedAt.description: When the entry was last updated.

UserConfig.title: User Config
UserConfig.description: User specific configuration, such as the salt for their master key.

salt.description: Base64 encoded salt used for PBKDF2 key derivation.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user-specific configuration like the crypto salt.
